desc_en: High-precision CNC machining center for automotive & aerospace, accuracy up to ±0.005mm
desc_zh: 高精度CNC加工中心，适用于汽车零部件、航空航天等领域，精度可达±0.005mm

desc_en: 6-axis articulated robot for welding, palletizing, and assembly lines. 20kg payload, ±0.03mm repeatability.
desc_zh: 6轴关节机器人，适用于焊接、码垛和装配线。负载20kg，重复精度±0.03mm。

desc_en: Servo-driven injection molding machine, 90-3000 ton clamping force, energy saving up to 60%.
desc_zh: 伺服驱动注塑成型机，90-3000吨锁模力，节能高达60%。

desc_en: Deep groove ball bearings, tapered roller bearings, ISO compliant for rotating machinery
desc_zh: 深沟球轴承、圆锥滚子轴承，符合ISO标准，适用于各类旋转机械

desc_en: Bolts, nuts, washers in grade 8.8/10.9/12.9, various coatings: zinc, Dacromet, hot-dip galvanized.
desc_zh: 螺栓、螺母、垫圈，8.8/10.9/12.9级，多种涂层：镀锌、达克罗、热浸镀锌。

desc_en: Carbide end mills, drills, inserts for CNC machining. TiAlN/TiCN coated for extended tool life.
desc_zh: 硬质合金立铣刀、钻头、刀片，适用于CNC加工。TiAlN/TiCN涂层延长刀具寿命。

desc_en: Gate, ball, butterfly valves in SS304/316, high temperature & pressure resistant
desc_zh: 闸阀、球阀、蝶阀系列，材质304/316，耐高温高压，适用于化工管路

desc_en: Centrifugal, diaphragm, and gear pumps for chemical, water treatment, and oil & gas applications.
desc_zh: 离心泵、隔膜泵和齿轮泵，适用于化工、水处理和石油天然气应用。

desc_en: High-power LED high bay & explosion-proof lights, IP65, 80% energy saving, 50000h lifespan
desc_zh: 高功率LED工矿灯、防爆灯，IP65防护等级，节能80%，寿命超50000小时

desc_en: Full turnkey PCB assembly, SMT & through-hole, compliant with IPC-A-610 Class 2/3 standards.
desc_zh: 全流程PCB组装，SMT和通孔，符合IPC-A-610 Class 2/3标准。

desc_en: Temperature, humidity, pressure, and vibration sensors with wireless connectivity for smart factories.
desc_zh: 温度、湿度、压力和振动传感器，具备无线连接功能，适用于智能工厂。

desc_en: Grain-oriented & non-oriented electrical steel, various thicknesses for transformers & motors
desc_zh: 取向/无取向电工钢，多种规格厚度，适用于变压器、电机铁芯制造

desc_en: Extruded aluminum profiles, 6061/6063/7075 alloys, various tempers, anodizing and powder coating available.
desc_zh: 挤压铝合金型材，6061/6063/7075合金，多种状态，可提供阳极氧化和粉末喷涂。

desc_en: Industrial chemicals, additives, resins, and raw materials for manufacturing
desc_zh: 工业化学品、添加剂、树脂等原材料，广泛应用于制造业

desc_en: Fabrics, garments, home textiles, and raw material exports for global markets
desc_zh: 面料、成衣、家纺及原材料出口，服务全球纺织市场

desc_en: Engine parts, brake systems, electronics, and accessories for automotive industry
desc_zh: 发动机零件、制动系统、电子器件及汽车配件出口

desc_en: Hydraulic pumps, cylinders, solenoid valves, working pressure up to 35MPa
desc_zh: 液压泵、液压缸、电磁阀，工作压力可达35MPa，适用于工程机械
